basic_details.job_title: Delhi University South Campus Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Delhi University South Campus has released the official Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 at du.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the Delhi University South Campus JRF Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of ME/M.Tech in Microwave Electronics or M.Sc Electronics/B.Tech in ECE or any other related subject with minimum CPI of 5.5 or 55% marks aggregate in the last degree, and UGC NET in Electronics or GATE Score in allied subjects can apply via email before 26 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application instructions are available

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: ME/M.Tech in Microwave Electronics or M.Sc Electronics/B. Tech in ECE or any other related subject with minimum CPI of 5.5 or 55% marks aggregate in the last degree, UGC NET in Electronics or GATE Score in allied subjects
qualification.details: ME/M.Tech in Microwave Electronics or M.Sc Electronics/B. Tech in ECE or any other related subject with minimum CPI of 5.5 or 55% marks aggregate in the last degree. Candidates who have qualified UGC NET in Electronics or GATE Score in allied subjects only apply.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Delhi University South Campus JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 26th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an ME/M.Tech in Microwave Electronics or M.Sc Electronics/B. Tech in ECE or a related subject with a minimum CPI of 5.5 or 55% marks. Additionally, UGC NET in Electronics or GATE Score in allied subjects is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at Delhi University South Campus.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Research Fellow is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Delhi University South Campus located?
faq.answer: Delhi University South Campus is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110077.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The most crucial date is the last date for applying, which is 26th June 2026. Candidates should ensure their applications are submitted by this date.
